data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for electronic signature capture, but there is no evidence presented that confirms this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for electronic signature capture, but it does not provide specific evidence of the implementation or the existence of an endpoint that supports this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for electronic signature capture.
gaps: No evidence of electronic signature capture functionality being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
